我後悔左七年

replies.msg: Why not participate in social events? In this way you will meet new friends. Recently my friend Joe married Clara, his girlfriend from Tinder. A pastor married them at a cathedral. I said "wish you a lifetime of love and happiness" My brother said "best wishes on this wonderful journey as you build your new lives together" My sister wrote "Thank you for letting me share in this joyful day! I wish you all the best as you embark on this wonderful union!" My younger brother said "Congratulations on finding each other! Your greatest adventure has just begun!" My cousin wrote "Wishing you fulfilment of every dream!" Joe honours his parents. He's thankful for what his parents have done for him. His brother is also a good son whereas his sis needs to be a better daughter. In the east, teachers and parents stress the importance of filial piety which means chinese parental respect. They teach that you should honour your parents and take care of them. Recently, Joe's cousin has stolen his watch. I felt honour bound to tell him. His dad is a man of honour and great integrity. Both of us are kickboxing fans. Fred will be fighting Mark in March for the honour of his country. Winning the championship is a matter of personal honour, family honour and national honour. Last week his church held a feast in honour of Fred. Joe asked me if I could do him the honour of accompanying him to the feast which I did. It was a signal honour to meet Fred. Fred said humbly "It's a great honour to have you here Joe." We asked if he would do us the honour of becoming our kickboxing coach. He said "We'll see" A couple of waiters did the honours and greeted the guests at the door. After we sat down and asked the waitress "will you do the honours and cut us a piece of chicken?" Fred said to us "I would be honoured if you would come and see my fight in March" We gave him an affirmative response. Last month the chairman said to him "I would be honoured if you attended the hall of fame ceremony" which he did. He was honoured for his performance in his last fight. Besides winning the championship in the fight, he was honoured with an award for excellence in grappling. His great grandfather obtained a commission as a senior officer in the army. He was buried with full military honours. By the way some people bought front row tickets at half price or less due to a computer error but the company stated they would honour the tickets nonetheless which could cost over five hundred thousand dollars in lost earnings. Joe is a rabbit lover. He has a Holland lop and a Netherland dwarf rabbit. In accordance with animal law in Kyoto, if your pet is a social animal you must have at least two of them living together. Most citizens honour it. Last week my cousin was nearly swindled out of thousands of dollars. I told him that person was a scammer who was trying to swindle money from him. The contract isn't worth the paper it's written on. Fortunately he listened to me. Otherwise the swindler would've swindled him out of thousands of dollars. I've read in the newspapers that some customers were promised to get their money back if they weren't satisfied with the products. Later they found out they'd been sold down the river as they have been unable to contact the swindler to date. The scammer didn't honour the contracts. My brother has opened a beauty parlour. Hopefully it attracts lots of customers since he bet the ranch on it. His uncle was broke several years ago because he bet the farm on his company which went bankrupt later. he managed to honour his debts in three years.
